gl.title: General ledger (GL)
gl.noCompany: Select an active company to work with the general ledger.
gl.sub: entries generated automatically from documents · journal register code 14-1-1, trial balance code 14-6-30, general ledger code 14-1-3

notify.journalError: Could not generate the journal register.
notify.balanceError: Could not generate the trial balance.
notify.ledgerError: Could not generate the general ledger.
notify.pnlError: Could not generate the profit and loss statement.
notify.bilantError: Could not generate the balance sheet.
notify.reconcileOk: GL reconciled successfully — balanced and with no discrepancies.
notify.reconcileInfo: Reconciliation complete — review the report below.
notify.generateNone: No documents to record in the selected period — the journal is unchanged. Accounting entries are generated per period: run again after new validations/credit notes.
notify.skippedReceived_one: {{count}} received invoice was NOT recorded (no VAT breakdown): {{refs}}. Fill in the VAT breakdown, then regenerate.
notify.skippedReceived_other: {{count}} received invoices were NOT recorded (no VAT breakdown): {{refs}}. Fill in the VAT breakdown, then regenerate.
notify.generateError: Could not generate the accounting entries.
notify.vatNothing: Nothing to settle — accounts 4426/4427 are already zero for the period.
notify.vatZero: VAT closing: VAT collected = deductible (zero balance).
notify.vatError: Could not post the VAT closing.
notify.closePeriodNone: No movements on income/expense accounts in the period.
notify.closePeriodError: Could not post the period closing.
notify.annualZero: Account 121 balance is zero — nothing to transfer.
notify.annualError: Could not post the annual closing.
notify.exportOk: Balance sheet XML exported (form per size criteria) — F10 + F20. Import it into the ANAF smart PDF, check the header and fill in F30.
notify.exportError: Could not export the balance sheet XML.

confirm.closePeriodText: Post the closing of income and expense accounts (classes 6 and 7) into account 121 for the period {{from}} … {{to}}? The operation is idempotent (re-posting replaces the previous closing of the same period).
confirm.taxText: Post the (estimated) income/profit tax for {{from}} … {{to}}? Records D 698/691 = C 4418/4411. Idempotent per period; run before "Close period".
confirm.annualText: Post the annual closing 121 → 117 for year {{year}}? The balance of account 121 (the year's result) is transferred to 117 "Retained earnings", with the entry dated 01.01.{{nextYear}}. Idempotent.

banner.skippedAction: — fill in the breakdown ("Recalculate VAT from XML" in the Purchases journal), then regenerate.

journal.title: Journal register (code 14-1-1) — {{period}}
journal.empty: No accounting entries in the period — press "Generate entries for {{month}}".
journal.emptySearch: No entries for the applied search.

balance.title: Trial balance — {{date}}
balance.empty: No accounting movements in the period.

closings.checklistHint: The recommended order for closing the month/year. Every step is idempotent (re-running recomputes correctly), so a skipped step can be run anytime without breaking anything.
closings.checklistOrderWarn: Order matters: post income/profit tax BEFORE closing the period (6/7→121). Otherwise the tax won't land in the year's result until you re-run the close.
closings.checklistS1: Generate the GL entries for the period (from invoices, payments, payroll, stock).
closings.checklistS3: Review received invoices — fill in the VAT breakdown if missing, then regenerate.
closings.checklistS4: Close VAT (4426/4427 → 4423/4424) — a balance-sheet presentation step.
closings.checklistS6: Close the period: 6/7 → 121 (result of the year).
closings.checklistS8: At year end: annual close 121 → 117 (retained earnings).
closings.vatNote: If <doc>4426</doc> > <doc>4427</doc>, the difference goes to <doc>4424</doc> VAT recoverable. <doc>4428</doc> "non-chargeable VAT" is not affected.
closings.postNote: Posts the <doc>6/7</doc> → <doc>121</doc> closing for the period (idempotent)
closings.annualNote: The annual closing <doc>121</doc> → <doc>117</doc> "Retained earnings" runs after Dec 31
closings.taxNote: Records D <doc>698/691</doc> = C <doc>4418/4411</doc> · idempotent per period, before "Close period"

reconcile.title: GL ↔ D300 reconciliation — {{period}}
reconcile.emptyHint: Press "Re-run check" to compare the GL balance with the D300 return.
reconcile.bannerOk: No discrepancies. GL balanced and aligned with the D300 return for {{period}}.

bilant.empty: No accounting movements in the period — generate the accounting entries first.
bilant.balancedNote: The balance sheet checks out: Assets = Equity + Liabilities ({{amount}} lei).
bilant.unbalancedNote: The balance sheet does NOT check out (Assets ≠ Equity + Liabilities) — check the trial balance.
bilant.s1003: Small entities — extended abridged balance sheet
bilant.s1002: Medium and large entities — full balance sheet
bilant.exportHint: The XML (F10 + F20) is imported into the ANAF smart PDF and validated with the DUKIntegrator software before filing. Filing deadline: 150 days after the end of the fiscal year.

rows.ofWhichResult: — of which result for the year

ledger.empty: No accounting movements in the period — the general ledger (code 14-1-3) is filled in after entries are generated.

partner.empty: No partner selected — choose a supplier or customer from the list above.
partner.noMovements: No accounting movements for the selected partner in the period.
partner.error: Could not load the partner ledger.

pnl.title: Profit and loss statement — {{period}}
pnl.empty: No movements on income/expense accounts in the period.
pnl.estimateNote: The tax is estimated ({{basis}}); for profit tax, fiscal adjustments (non-deductible expenses, non-taxable income) are not included. The closing entries (D 7xx / C 121, D 121 / C 6xx) are prepared ({{rows}} rows).

modal.title: Generate balance sheet XML — fiscal year {{year}}
modal.subtitle: Confirm the identification data for the XML
modal.banner: The form (micro-enterprise S1005 / small S1003 / large S1002) is chosen per the OMFP criteria (2 of 3: assets, turnover, number of employees). Per OMFP 1802/2014 pt. 13(2), the category changes only if the criteria are exceeded in two consecutive fiscal years — a single exceedance keeps the previous year's form.
modal.formAuto: Auto — classification by criteria (2 of 3 + 2-year rule)
modal.priorLabel: Form filed for the previous year ({{year}})
modal.priorHint: the category changes only after 2 consecutive years of exceeding / falling under the criteria
modal.footNote: Generates XML F10 + F20 (import into the ANAF smart PDF)
